kernel_subject: net: split out SIOCDEVPRIVATE handling from dev_ioctl
stage1_reason: Driver changed from ndo_do_ioctl to ndo_siocdevprivate callback in net_device_ops structure, adapting to kernel networking API changes for private ioctl handling.
stage2_reason: Kernel commit b9067f5dc4a0 explicitly splits out SIOCDEVPRIVATE handling from dev_ioctl, directly matching driver's migration from ndo_do_ioctl to ndo_siocdevprivate for private ioctl handling.
